mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT APP_CD AS appCd ,APP_CD_NM AS appCdNm ,PARENT_APP_CD AS parentAppCd ,LV_CD AS lvCd ,ALIGN_ORDER_NO AS alignOrderNo ,APP_CD_DESC AS appCdDesc ,@rownum:=@rownum+1 as rn
FROM TBAPPCD WHERE 1=1
AND APP_CD like CONCAT('%',#{appCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND APP_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{appCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PARENT_APP_CD like CONCAT('%',#{parentAppCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lvCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ALIGN_ORDER_NO like CONCAT('%',#{alignOrderNo, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND APP_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{appCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
) as p, (SELECT @rownum:=0) as r where p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) and p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC})) ORDER BY p.lvCd, p.alignOrderNo, p.appCd

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBAPPCD WHERE 1=1
AND APP_CD like CONCAT('%',#{appCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND APP_CD_NM like CONCAT('%',#{appCdNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND PARENT_APP_CD like CONCAT('%',#{parentAppCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND LV_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lvCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND ALIGN_ORDER_NO like CONCAT('%',#{alignOrderNo, jdbcType = NUMERIC},'%')
AND APP_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{appCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT APP_CD AS appCd ,APP_CD_NM AS appCdNm ,PARENT_APP_CD AS parentAppCd ,LV_CD AS lvCd ,ALIGN_ORDER_NO AS alignOrderNo ,APP_CD_DESC AS appCdDesc FROM TBAPPCD WHERE APP_CD = #{appCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND LV_CD = #{lvCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND PARENT_APP_CD = #{parentAppCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

SELECT EAI_IF_DATA_SEQ_NBR as ifDataSeq, EAI_IF_DATA_CRT_TMSTMP as ifDataCrtTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TP_CD as ifDataAplyTpCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD as ifDataAplyStsCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TMSTMP as ifDataAplyTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_CD as ifDataAplyErrCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_MSG_CONT as ifDataAplyErrMsg, CD_DMN_LGCL_NM as dmnLgclNm, CD_DMN_PSCL_NM as dmnPsclNm, CD_DMN_CD_VAL as dmnCdVal, CD_DMN_CD_VAL_GLBL_NM as dmnCdValGlbl, CD_DMN_CD_VAL_LCAL_NM as dmnCdValLcal FROM TB_EAI_CD_DMN_CD_VAL_I WHERE (EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'N' OR EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'E') AND (CD_DMN_PSCL_NM ='APP_CD');
